case_title: CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA, N.A. VS. CHRISTOPHER A CANIGIULA et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT CANIGIULA, CHRISTOPHER A DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-28-2011
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-20-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-20-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: DAWSON, ANGELA C SUBSTITUTED FOR ZIDE, FLINT COREY AS ATTORNEY FOR CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA, N.A.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
